name: KTLYST - KTLYST Rule 1
description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.

name: KTLYST - IOC Detection - www.propublica.org
description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
query:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(90d)
| where RemoteUrl has "www.propublica.org"
| summarize HitCount = count(),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, RemoteUrl
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 100

name: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Documentation evasion leading to regulatory approval bypass
description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference", "DisableRealtimeMonitoring", "-ep bypass")
    or FileName in~ ("reg.exe", "attrib.exe")
| summarize EventCount = count(),
    UniqueCommands = dcount(ProcessCommandLine),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, AccountName
| sort by EventCount desc
| take 100

name: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Cobbled product deployment without security mapping
description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ActionType == "FileModified"
| where FileName endswith_cs ".encrypted" or FileName matches regex @"\.[a-z]{5,8}$"
| summarize ModifiedCount = count(),
    UniqueExtensions = dcount(FileName),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where ModifiedCount >= 50
| sort by ModifiedCount desc
| take 100

name: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Developer account termination without notification
description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailedCount = count(),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated)
    by UserPrincipalName
| where FailedCount >= 5 or UniqueIPs >= 3
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 100

name: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Hyperconvergence strategy creating single point of failure
description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailedCount = count(),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated)
    by UserPrincipalName
| where FailedCount >= 5 or UniqueIPs >= 3
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 100
